creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have incorporated some changes into the upgrade to 9.0.0 here:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=7ee64fc8601d62f365febeafa97614fb02f616c4

Feel free to open a new PR for further fixes. Please consider that incorporating aesthetic-only fixes will be considered low priority: the Tcl/Tk ports have been maintained mostly by me alone for years, and I have a limited amount of time, which I'd rather spend on functional things rather than on playing catch up with the newest recommendations from the porters handbook.
